notes: Same as winner_4x_lat10 but latency_wait=30. lat=10 had ~4 MissingOutputException due to NFS visibility >10s under load. Testing if 30s clears it.

Comparison to winner_4x_lat30 (which was clean at 6.10 min). Same mem (4x) and lat=30, but use_arrays=false — each job submitted as its own sbatch, no mini-snakemake batching. Tests the hypothesis that array batching is what creates back-to-back NFS writes/stats and exposes attribute-cache races.
